subject: Tumor board agenda, Thursday 7:30 AM
body_preview: Five cases on the list this week, two need nutrition input ahead of treatment planning.

subject: Re: T2D study protocol amendment
body_preview: Drafting the amendment to simplify the food log to a 3-day recall. Review before I submit to IRB.

subject: Dietetic intern orientation, Monday
body_preview: Hannah's badge access and EHR training are set. She'll meet you in Clinical Nutrition at 7:30.

subject: Oncology nutrition consult, bed 14
body_preview: Patient in 14 is struggling with intake post-chemo. Can you assess before rounds tomorrow?

subject: Clinical Nutrition staff meeting moved
body_preview: The monthly department meeting is moving to the second Wednesday at 1 PM. Updated invite to follow.

subject: Formulary update, diabetes medications
body_preview: Heads up on the formulary change affecting two of your diabetic inpatients' regimens this month.

subject: FNCE abstract, co-author sign-off
body_preview: Final draft of the culturally adapted intervention abstract attached. Need your sign-off by Friday.

subject: Endocrinology referral pathway, diabetes inpatients
body_preview: Proposing a standing nutrition consult for newly diagnosed T2D admissions. Your thoughts before committee?

subject: November tumor board - nutrition consult roster
body_preview: Courtney, roster for the November tumor board nutrition consultation is ready. You are down for 3 patient consults this month (patients redacted in this notice - full list in the internal chart). Session is the second Wednesday. Please confirm receipt.
